page.title: Everything wey don happen
page.description: Invites, contributions, payouts, and everything wey dey happen for your account.

settings.title: Notification settings
settings.description: Choose how much you wan hear from MoolaHub.
settings.saveError: We no fit save your choice.

everything.label: Everything
everything.description: All notifications: circle activity, goal milestones, deposits, reminders, and tips.

essential.label: Essential
essential.description: Only important updates, like payouts, contribution due dates, and account activity.

minimal.label: Small small
minimal.description: Only the most important account and money notifications.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Choose the exact categories wey you wan hear about.

money.label: Money & transactions
money.description: Deposits, withdrawals, payouts, and contribution reminders.

social.label: Group savings & social
social.description: Invites, member activity, and circle updates.

engagement.label: Tips & engagement
engagement.description: Streaks, learning reminders, and product news.

notFound.title: We no find dis page
notFound.description: The page wey you dey find no dey or e fit don move.
